title: Sistercraft
description: A small modpack compiled for my sister and I. It has things like Minecolonies and the Let's Do mods
body:
A small modpack made for my sister and I. It features interests of both of us. For my sister- she enjoys building and farming. Myself- I enjoy adventure and finding powerful artifacts and treasures.

This pack has mods such as:
+ Minecolonies
+ various Let's Do mods
+ Quark
+ Supplementaries
+ Alex's Mobs
+ Alex's Caves
+ Spelunkery

The Quark Programmer Art is from here: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark/files/3106626](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark/files/3106626)
